args.description: Override default container args (useful when using custom images)
args.title: args

command.description: Override default container command (useful when using custom images)
command.title: command

commonAnnotations.description: Annotations to add to all deployed objects
commonAnnotations.title: commonAnnotations

commonLabels.description: Labels to add to all deployed objects
commonLabels.title: commonLabels

configMapAnnotations.description: Additional annotations for the ConfigMap objects. Evaluated as a template
configMapAnnotations.title: configMapAnnotations

configMapLabels.description: Additional labels for the ConfigMap objects. Evaluated as a template
configMapLabels.title: configMapLabels

capabilities.description: Fine-grained Linux kernel privileges to add or drop for the container
capabilities.title: capabilities

readOnlyRootFilesystem.description: Mounts the container root filesystem read-only to prevent in-place writes or tampering
readOnlyRootFilesystem.title: readOnlyRootFilesystem

runAsNonRoot.description: Boolean that requires the container to run as a non-root UID (prevents starting if UID 0)
runAsNonRoot.title: runAsNonRoot

runAsUser.description: UID the container processes run as (overrides container image default)
runAsUser.title: runAsUser

enableTls.description: Enable TLS for the PostgreSQL database connection
enableTls.title: enableTls

existingSecretKey.description: Key in the existing Secret containing the password for the PostgreSQL database
existingSecretKey.title: existingSecretKey

existingSecretName.description: Name of an existing Secret containing credentials for the PostgreSQL database, as an alternative to the password field. Note: the Secret must already exist in the  same namespace at the time of deployment
existingSecretName.title: existingSecretName

enabled.description: Conditional property used in parent chart
enabled.title: enabled

exampleValue.description: # It is required by CI/CD tools and processes. # @skip exampleValue #
exampleValue.title: exampleValue

extraDeploy.description: Array of extra objects to deploy with the release
extraDeploy.title: extraDeploy

extraEnvVarsCMs.description: List of ConfigMaps containing extra env vars
extraEnvVarsCMs.title: extraEnvVarsCMs

extraEnvVarsSecrets.description: List of Secrets containing extra env vars
extraEnvVarsSecrets.title: extraEnvVarsSecrets

extraOptionsSpec.description: Extra options to place under .spec (e.g. replicas, strategy, revisionHistoryLimit, etc). Evaluated as a template
extraOptionsSpec.title: extraOptionsSpec

extraOptionsTemplateSpec.description: Extra options to place under .spec.template.spec (e.g. nodeSelector, affinity, restartPolicy, etc). Evaluated as a template
extraOptionsTemplateSpec.title: extraOptionsTemplateSpec

extraVolumeMounts.description: List of volume mounts to add to the container (evaluated as template). Normally used with `extraVolumes`
extraVolumeMounts.title: extraVolumeMounts

extraVolumes.description: List of volumes to add to the deployment (evaluated as template). Requires setting `extraVolumeMounts`
extraVolumes.title: extraVolumes

imageCredentials.description: Optional credentials to log in and fetch images from a private registry. These credentials are shared with all the subcharts automatically
imageCredentials.title: imageCredentials

imageCredentialsSecrets.description: Optional list of existing Secrets containing image pull credentials to use for pulling images from private registries. These Secrets are shared with all the subcharts automatically
imageCredentialsSecrets.title: imageCredentialsSecrets

ingress.description: `ingress.*` value takes precedence when set; otherwise the global is used.

annotations.description: Annotations merged into the Ingress. Local `ingress.annotations` wins on key collision. Evaluated as a template
annotations.title: annotations

defaultPathType.description: Default path type applied to ingress rules when `ingress.defaultPathType` is not set. `Prefix` works for nginx, traefik, AWS ALB, and most modern controllers.
defaultPathType.title: defaultPathType

enabled.description: Enable Ingress for this chart. OR'd with the chart's local `ingress.enabled` so setting this once at the parent enables all subchart Ingresses.
enabled.title: enabled

extraLabels.description: Extra labels merged into the Ingress. Local `ingress.extraLabels` wins on key collision. Evaluated as a template
extraLabels.title: extraLabels

ingressClassName.description: Default ingress class name applied when `ingress.ingressClassName` is not set
ingressClassName.title: ingressClassName

path.description: Default path applied to ingress rules when `ingress.path` is not set. AWS ALB users should override to `/*`.
path.title: path

tls.description: TLS entries concatenated with the local `ingress.tls`. Evaluated as a template
tls.title: tls

ingress.title: ingress

waveDomain.description: Domain where Wave listens. Evaluated as a template
waveDomain.title: waveDomain

digest.description: Container image digest in the format `sha256:1234abcdef`
digest.title: digest

pullSecrets.description: List of imagePullSecrets Secrets must be created in the same namespace, for example using the .extraDeploy array Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/configure-pod-container/pull-image-private-registry/
pullSecrets.title: pullSecrets

annotations.description: Ingress annotations specific to your load balancer. Evaluated as a template
annotations.title: annotations

defaultBackend.description: Configure the default service for the ingress (evaluated as template) Important: make sure only one defaultBackend is defined across the k8s cluster: if the ingress doesn't reconcile successfully, 'describe ingress <name>' will report problems
defaultBackend.title: defaultBackend

defaultPathType.description: Default path type for the Ingress. When empty, falls back to `global.ingress.defaultPathType`
defaultPathType.title: defaultPathType

extraHosts.description: Additional hosts you want to include. Evaluated as a template
extraHosts.title: extraHosts

extraLabels.description: Additional labels for the ingress object. Evaluated as a template
extraLabels.title: extraLabels

ingressClassName.description: Name of the ingress class (replaces the deprecated annotation `kubernetes.io/ingress.class`). When empty, falls back to `global.ingress.ingressClassName`
ingressClassName.title: ingressClassName

path.description: Path for the main ingress rule. When empty, falls back to `global.ingress.path`
path.title: path

tls.description: TLS configuration. Evaluated as a template
tls.title: tls

enabled.description: Enable init containers that coordinate startup dependencies
enabled.title: enabled

enabled.description: Enable wait for PostgreSQL init container before starting the main container
enabled.title: enabled

extraEnvVars.description: Additional environment variables for the init container. The special variable `MYSQL_EXTRA_ARGS` is appended verbatim to the `mysql` readiness check command, and can be used to pass TLS flags when connecting to managed MySQL services such as AWS RDS or Azure Database for MySQL that require certificate verification. Pair with `extraVolumeMounts` to mount the CA certificate into the container. Example (TLS with CA certificate mounted from a volume): extraEnvVars:   - name: MYSQL_EXTRA_ARGS     value: "--ssl-ca=/certs/ca.pem --ssl-mode=VERIFY_IDENTITY"
extraEnvVars.title: extraEnvVars

extraVolumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts for the init container. Use this to mount CA certificates (e.g. from a Secret or ConfigMap populated by an extraInitContainer) so that `MYSQL_EXTRA_ARGS` can reference them.
extraVolumeMounts.title: extraVolumeMounts

digest.description: Digest must be in the format `sha256:1234abcdef`
digest.title: digest

registry.title: registry
